zh: 專屬路線，指司機固定行駛的路線
en: Cardinal offers dedicated routes so drivers can return home daily.
en_example: Cardinal offers dedicated routes so drivers can return home daily.
zh_example: Cardinal offers dedicated routes so drivers can return home daily.
ja: 専用ルート、ドライバーが毎日帰宅できるように固定されたルート
ja_example: Cardinal offers dedicated routes so drivers can return home daily.

en: Cardinal logistics offers great compensation and benefits.
en_example: Cardinal logistics offers great compensation and benefits.
zh_example: Cardinal logistics offers great compensation and benefits.
ja_example: Cardinal logistics offers great compensation and benefits.

en: Drivers receive bonuses for sign-on, referral, and performance.
en_example: Drivers receive bonuses for sign-on, referral, and performance.
zh_example: Drivers receive bonuses for sign-on, referral, and performance.
ja: ボーナス、追加の金銭的報酬
ja_example: Drivers receive bonuses for sign-on, referral, and performance.

en: We are uncompromising in our dedication to driver safety.
en_example: We are uncompromising in our dedication to driver safety.
zh_example: We are uncompromising in our dedication to driver safety.
ja: 妥協しない、原則を貫く
ja_example: We are uncompromising in our dedication to driver safety.

en: Cardinal has one of the largest dedicated fleets in the country.
en_example: Cardinal has one of the largest dedicated fleets in the country.
zh_example: Cardinal has one of the largest dedicated fleets in the country.
ja: 車両隊、複数の車両の集まり
ja_example: Cardinal has one of the largest dedicated fleets in the country.

zh: 車主兼司機，自己擁有並經營卡車的人
en: Cardinal is looking for both company drivers and owner operators.
en_example: Cardinal is looking for both company drivers and owner operators.
zh_example: Cardinal is looking for both company drivers and owner operators.
ja: オーナーオペレーター、自分のトラックを所有し運転する人
ja_example: Cardinal is looking for both company drivers and owner operators.

zh: 駕駛紀錄報告（Motor Vehicle Record）
en: Applicants must have a clean MVR in their driving record.
en_example: Applicants must have a clean MVR in their driving record.
zh_example: Applicants must have a clean MVR in their driving record.
ja: 運転記録証明書（Motor Vehicle Record）
ja_example: Applicants must have a clean MVR in their driving record.

zh: 推薦入職，介紹他人加入公司
en: Drivers can earn bonuses for sign-on referral.
en_example: Drivers can earn bonuses for sign-on referral.
zh_example: Drivers can earn bonuses for sign-on referral.
ja: 入社紹介、他人を会社に紹介すること
ja_example: Drivers can earn bonuses for sign-on referral.

zh: 卡車維護，保持卡車良好狀態的工作
en: Cardinal is dedicated to truck maintenance and driver safety.
en_example: Cardinal is dedicated to truck maintenance and driver safety.
zh_example: Cardinal is dedicated to truck maintenance and driver safety.
ja: トラックの整備、トラックを良好な状態に保つこと
ja_example: Cardinal is dedicated to truck maintenance and driver safety.
